titleStmt.title: SII 9.477: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 477. (A.R. No. 703 of 1919.) ON A PILLAR IN THE LAKSHMI TEMPLE AT GULYA, ALUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1430, Śukla, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 10, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1509 July 26 Thursday; the Śaka year, however, was 1431 expired. The record refers itself to the reign of the Vijayanagara king Kṛishṇadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It states that Narasarāja, son of Gōparāja and Kasavamāmbā, grandson of Nāgarāja and Gavuramāmbā, of Kauṇḍinya-gōtra, Yajuś-śākhā and of the Kamme sect of Brāhmans, the chief of the town Yēṭūru in Gaṇḍikōṭe-sīme and the minister of Vīraṇa-Nāyaka, son of the Sēnādhipati Karaṇada Sōmaṇṇa-Nāyaka, caused the construction of the temple of Virūpāksha consisting of the garbha-gṛiha, sukhanāsi and raṅga-maṇḍapa, had a well sunk and a mango-garden planted. He also made a grant of land in Virupasamudra for the service of the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśā
livāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu 1430
neya śuklasaṁvatsarada śrāva
ṇa śu 10 gu śrīmanmahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa kriṣṇadēvarāyamahārā
yaru vijayanagaradalu sā
mrājyavanu Āḷalikkāgaliya
vara sēnādhipati karuṇada sō
mma(ṁ)ṇnāykara Āyanūrō
māṁbagarbhapuṇyōdaya vī
raṇanāykara pradhānanu brahmaku
lavaṁśōdbhava yajuśākādhyāya
kaṁmekulaAdbhicaṁdramanu
kauṇiṁnyagōtrajanu gaṁḍikō
ṭeya sīme yēṭūra puravarādhī
śvaranu nāgarāja gauramāṁbapautra
na gōparājakasavamāṁbakagarbhapa
ripūr(ṁ)nnamacaṁdramanū narasarāja
nū śrīparamēśvaraprītiyāgi viru
pākṣadēvara guḍi garbagṛha sukha nā
si raṁgamaṁṭapavanu kaṭisi
bāviyanū Āgusi māvina tō
panu yikkistanū sivaprītiyā
(ṁ)gi �yo dēvarige mānya virupa
samudragrāmada �yoruṁmara
holasīmeyalū yareya
holanu bījavari Ādavāni Āyi
goḷagada kallayadavara mānyake
paḍuvalu Ā gōbīvari māvi
na tōpi kāya pala bāviya baḷi
ya tōṭa pēṭeyalu gāṇigara
yaṁṇe pasige yiṣṭanu koṭeU
�yo dhar(ṁ)make Ārādaru Aḷipide
varu vāraṇāsili paṁcamahā
pātakaṁgaḷu māḍidavarū hōha
narakake hōhavarū yendū ko
ṭa śāsanau Ācaṁdratārakākhya
sivanāma Uṁṭapariyaṁta .
Digital edition of SII 9.477 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
